posting.sourceTitle: Finishing Trades Institute of New York
posting.sponsorName: Finishing Trades Institute of New York
posting.applicationSummary: Apply in person at Finishing Trades Institute of New York, 45-15 36th Street, Long Island City, during posted business hours. This is a limited recruitment with 800 applications distributed first come, first served.
posting.applicationInPersonAddress: Finishing Trades Institute of New York, 45-15 36th Street, Long Island City, NY 11101
posting.applicationHours: 9:00 a.m. to 3:30 p.m., Monday through Friday; extended until 5:00 p.m. on Wednesdays, April 1 and April 8.
posting.applicationLimitDetails: Limited-application recruitment. Only 800 applications will be distributed on a first-come, first-served basis. Recruitment runs for 10 business days or until 800 applications have been issued, whichever comes first.
posting.ageRequirement: Must be at least 18 years old.
posting.educationRequirement: Must have a high school diploma or a high school equivalency diploma such as GED or TASC. Proof is required at enrollment.
posting.drugTestRequirement: Must take a drug test before enrollment and randomly during apprenticeship, at the sponsor's expense.
posting.classRequirement: A mandatory orientation will provide more information about the job requirements.
allRequirements: Must be at least 18 years old.
Must have a high school diploma or a high school equivalency diploma (such as GED or TASC). Proof of high school diploma or equivalent will be required at the time of enrollment in apprenticeship.
Must be able to pass a physical examination, at the expense of sponsor, after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship.

Must be physically able to perform the work of a painter and decorator (Structural Steel-Bridges) as determined by site evaluations and personal statement. More information will be provided during a mandatory orientation.
Must take a drug test prior to enrollment and random throughout in apprenticeship, at the expense of sponsor.
Must be able to read, hear, and understand instructions and warnings in English.

Must sign an affidavit stating that they are physically able to perform the work of a Painter and Decorator (Structural Steel-Bridges), including lifting and carrying material and equipment up to 70 pounds and working from ladders, scaffolds, lifts, and suspended scaffolds.
posting.requirementsSummary: Applicants must be at least 18, have a high school diploma or equivalent, pass a physical, pass drug testing, understand English, and sign an affidavit confirming they can do the work.
posting.contactName: Finishing Trades Institute of New York
posting.contactSummary: For further information, contact Finishing Trades Institute of New York at (718) 937-7440.
